briefdescription.para: < prevent circular inclusions
Disables the OSPIPSV device.
Enables the OSPIPSV device.
Configures the OSPI MUX to Linear mode.
Configures the OSPI MUX to DMA mode.
Flash command based data reading using flash command control registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

simplesect.para: This operation is in IO mode of reading.

briefdescription.para: Flash command based data write using flash command control registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

simplesect.para: This operation is in IO mode of writing.

briefdescription.para: Reads the data using Linear controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Writes the data Using Linear controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Reads the data using DMA.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Reads data from RX FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

simplesect.para: This operation is in IO mode of reading.

briefdescription.para: Writes data to TX FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

simplesect.para: This operation is in IO mode of writing.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XOspiPsv *InstancePtr, u32 Cmd_op, u32 Rd_data_en, u32 Num_rd_data_bytes, u32 Cmd_addr_en, u32 Mode_bit_en, u32 Num_addr_bytes, u32 Wr_data_en, u32 Num_wr_data_bytes, u32 Dummy, u32 Membank_en)
memberdef.name: XOspiPsv_Setup_Stig_Ctrl

briefdescription.para: Configures the STIG control register (Flash cmd register).

parameterdescription.para: Specifies whether cmd_op requires data to read or not.
Specifies whether cmd_op requires addr or not.
Specifies whether cmd_op requires write enable or not.

briefdescription.para: Configures the below info to write instruction register DataXfertype - SPI/Dual/Quad/Octal AddrXfertype - 3 or 4B.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

simplesect.para: Used in DMA or Linear operations.

briefdescription.para: Configures the below info to read instruction register DataXfertype - SPI/Dual/Quad/Octal AddrXfertype - 3 or 4B.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

simplesect.para: Used in DMA or Linear operations

briefdescription.para: Sets the device size config register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Initiates the indirect read transfer.
Configures the Indirect controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Sets up the Dma configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: Initiates the DMA transfer.
Executes the Flash command configured using Flash Command control register.

simplesect.para: Wait till the command is executed.

briefdescription.para: Checks for OSPI idle which means Serial interface and low level SPI pipeline is IDLE.
Waits for bit to be set.

detaileddescription.para: This API polls for the required bit for 10 seconds, if not set then timeout occurs.

parameterdescription.para: Bit mask to check for lock.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if lock bit is set.

briefdescription.para: Performs RX Tuning for SDR/DDR mode to calculate RX DLL Delay.

memberdef.argsstring: (XOspiPsv *InstancePtr, XOspiPsv_Msg *FlashMsg, u8 *AvgRXTap, u8 *MaxWindowSize, u8 DummyIncr, u32 TXTap)
memberdef.name: XOspiPsv_CalculateRxTap

briefdescription.para: Calculates the Max window size and the corresponding Average Rx Tap.

parameterdescription.para: Tx tap value used while doing Rx tuning.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if lock bit is set.

briefdescription.para: Configures the Rx and Tx taps in Phy Configuration register.
Writes data in Non-DMA Indirect mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if successful.
XST_FAILURE if fails.

briefdescription.para: This function performs a polled data receive operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: This function performs a polled data send operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: This function performs an interrupt-based data receive operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: This function performs an interrupt-based data send operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.
